reviews.comment:
Lamentable que el dueño o encargado de la cafeteria de esta Ypf quiera estafar gente. Hicimos una compra y sumo todo mentalmente,  le pedimos el ticket porque nos llamo la atencion que haya sumado tan rapido y un numero redondo y caro. No le andaba la controladora. Nos hizo una "factura" que al no darle los nros empezo a tachar y finalmente nos devolvio "algo" de lo que nos habia cobrado de mas "sin querer" porque parece que ve doble. A cuantos se lo habra hecho este personaje!!! Cuidado gente cuando compren aca!! O directamente no compren!

(Translated by Google)
It's deplorable that the owner or manager of the cafeteria at this YPF station is trying to scam people. We made a purchase, and he mentally added everything up. We asked for the receipt because we were surprised that he added it up so quickly and with such a large, round number. His card reader wasn't working. He gave us a "receipt," but when we didn't give him the numbers, he started crossing things out. Finally, he refunded us "some" of what he had "unintentionally" overcharged us because he seems to have double vision. How many people has this guy scammed?! Be careful when you shop here! Or just don't shop here at all!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMtc2NhOUh3EAE
